message:
feat: integrate meta_skill (ms) knowledge management service

Add ms service for local-first knowledge management with semantic search:
- New ms.service.ts with CLI wrapper functions
- New /api/knowledge routes for search, entries CRUD, status
- Handles embedding service availability gracefully
- Returns 503 with install instructions when CLI unavailable

Note: Committing previously completed work from flywheel_gateway-f4q.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
